protein_name: The production of the second messenger molecules diacylglycerol (DAG) and inositol 1,4,5-trisphosphate (IP3) is mediated by activated phosphatidylinositol-specific phospholipase C enzymes. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
